title: scrophularia tortuosissima
intro: Scrophularia tortuosissima, also known as the twisted figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia tortuosissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate asthma symptoms, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
